title: Crunchy Japanese Chestnut Mushroom Soba Noodles
description: A pungent and crunchy Japanese dish featuring chestnut mushroom and infused oil, perfect for a romantic dinner
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the soba noodles according to the package instructions
In a large skillet, heat the infused oil over medium heat and saute the sliced chestnut mushrooms until they are tender and lightly browned
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and sesame oil
Add the cooked soba noodles to the skillet with the mushrooms and pour the soy sauce mixture over the top
Toss the noodles and mushrooms to combine and cook for an additional 2 minutes
Sprinkle the sesame seeds and chopped scallions over the top of the noodles and mushrooms
Season with salt and pepper to taste
Serve the noodles hot and enjoy
